name: synth near-tie seed baseline-establishment; probe probe_top1 → abstain
description: Programmatically synthesized via scripts/synthesize_tiebreaker_fixtures.py. Probe text is the top-1 select_when sentence from a third-party model (step-back) in the knowledge graph — NOT authored in-session. Expected outcome is DERIVED from cosine measurement against the live embeddings DB, not asserted by the author. See §14e option 2 in the handover.
notes: Outcome classified by gate rules: max(cos_top1, cos_top2) < 0.45 → abstain; cos_top2 > cos_top1 → swap; else no_swap. If this scenario's assertion is wrong, the matcher changed OR the DB was rebuilt with different embeddings — re-running the synthesizer will recompute the expected class.
